title: All about St. Xavier's KOLKATA - Fees, Placement, Courses, Admission procedure, Entrance
body: I am a product of St Xavier's College Kolkata. If you are serious about academics this is one of the best colleges in the country. I completed my Bcom Morning Batch and the teachers were awesome, they conducted a lot of seminars and we had an open discussion on various aspects. Not only does the college excels in academics but it also excels in extra-curricular activities sports like football, tt, cricket tournaments are hosted on a regular basis. We also had a social credit system weherby we had to collect credits or points by doing various charitable and had to volunteer in NGOS, old age home etc to get the credits. The Canteen is also nominal and has a wide variety of options available. Overall i enjoyed my stay in  this wondeful college. If you are serious about your career and studies this college will not disappoint you. NIHIL ULTRA.........
author: @highhope8200

title: All about St. Xavier's KOLKATA - Fees, Placement, Courses, Admission procedure, Entrance
